name: Pizza Dough in Bread Machine
recipeIngredient: cornmeal for sprinkling on baking pan
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all dough ingredients, except cornmeal, into the bread machine pan or bowl in the order listed (or reverse order depending on machine type).
2. Select the dough setting.
3. When the machine beeps, remove the dough after about 1 hour and 10 minutes (and 1 hour 20 minutes if using a different setting).
4. Form the dough into a ball and let rest for 10 minutes.
5. Sprinkle cornmeal on a 14-inch round pizza pan or inside a 9x13 inch baking pan.
6. Roll out the dough to fit the pan shape, then stretch it to fit inside the preferred pan.
7. Spread pizza sauce over the top and sprinkle with favorite toppings (e.g., ham, pre-fried bacon, green and yellow pepper, mushrooms, purple onion, cheddar cheese, and Monterey Jack cheese).
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the crust is lightly browned. Makes one 14-inch crust.
Notes:
I melted about 2 tablespoons butter and added 1/2 teaspoon garlic salt. I brushed this mixture around the edge of the pizza (the rim not covered with tomato sauce) before baking.
